posts.author: TYansick (Trinity Yansick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Is there a way to modify the 4 month rule for My Work? My organization plans events a year + in advance. We have our event boards set up so we only have to set the event date and then it auto-generates the timeline and due dates for all of the tasks. Since some tasks are started a year in advance, and others are a week before the event, the tasks closer to the event date will not have been updated since we created the board. This means they will not show up on My Work, and I am worried something will be missed.

What are you trying to achieve

Get rid of/modify the 4 month rule for My Work tasks.
